Optimisation du portefeuille d'actifs financiers Maghrebia¶

Ce notebook utilise les sorties validées du diagnostic pré-optimisation. Contrairement à une optimisation purement financière, l'allocation proposée est construite sous contraintes réglementaires : les contraintes sont contrôlées sur le portefeuille total, composé de la poche non optimisable conservée et de la poche optimisable réallouée.

1. Paramètres et imports¶

Objectif : fixer les chemins, les paramètres de risque et les contraintes communes.
Méthode : les rendements attendus principaux sont ceux du modèle APT ; les rendements historiques servent aux métriques ex-post.
Limite : les contraintes non testables faute de données sont conservées dans les rapports, mais ne sont pas inventées.

In [2]:
from pathlib import Path
from dataclasses import replace
import json
import math
import sys

import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import plotly.graph_objects as go
import plotly.express as px
from IPython.display import display, Markdown

import plotly.io as pio

pio.renderers.default = "iframe_connected"
def find_project_root(start: Path) -> Path:
    """
    Détecte automatiquement la racine du projet.
    Critères : présence de data/, input/, outputs/, notebooks/, src/ ou pyproject.toml.
    """

    start = Path(start).resolve()
    for parent in [start] + list(start.parents):
        project_markers = [
            parent / 'data',
            parent / 'input',
            parent / 'outputs',
            parent / 'notebooks',
            parent / 'src',
            parent / 'pyproject.toml',
        ]
        if any(marker.exists() for marker in project_markers):
            return parent
    return Path.cwd()


PROJECT_DIR = find_project_root(Path.cwd())
INPUT_DIR = PROJECT_DIR / 'input'
fallback_input = Path(r'C:\Users\Houssem\OneDrive\Desktop\Projet\OptimisationPFE\input')
if not INPUT_DIR.exists() and fallback_input.exists():
    INPUT_DIR = fallback_input
NOTEBOOK_PATH = PROJECT_DIR / 'notebooks' / '02_optimisation_portefeuille.ipynb'
SRC_DIR = PROJECT_DIR / 'src'
if str(SRC_DIR) not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, str(SRC_DIR))

from maghrebia_quant.optimization_apt import (
    APTOptimizationConfig,
    build_asset_alignment,
    build_context,
    build_internal_constraints_map,
    build_multiobjective_scores,
    build_regulatory_constraints_map,
    build_universe,
    evaluate_constraints,
    final_recommendation,
    generate_monte_carlo,
    load_apt_optimization_inputs,
    optimized_weights_table,
    portfolio_metrics,
    references_table,
    risk_contributions,
    solve_all_models,
    solve_efficient_frontier,
    stress_tests_by_portfolio,
)

DATA_DIR = PROJECT_DIR / 'data'
OUTPUT_DIR = PROJECT_DIR / 'outputs'
FIGURES_DIR = OUTPUT_DIR / 'figures_html' / '02_optimisation_portefeuille'
TABLES_DIR = OUTPUT_DIR / 'tables_csv' / '02_optimisation_portefeuille'
OUTPUT_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
FIGURES_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
TABLES_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
PROJECT_ROOT_DETECTED = 'PASSED' if (PROJECT_DIR.exists() and OUTPUT_DIR.exists() and (INPUT_DIR.exists() or DATA_DIR.exists())) else 'FAILED'

CONFIG = APTOptimizationConfig()
EXCEL_OUTPUT = OUTPUT_DIR / '02_optimisation_portefeuille_results.xlsx'
np.random.seed(CONFIG.random_seed)
print('Racine projet détectée:', PROJECT_DIR)

Racine projet détectée: C:\Users\Houssem\OneDrive\Desktop\Projet\JupyterProject1

Chargement explicite des inputs APT¶

Les rendements attendus proviennent du modèle APT macro-financier tunisien. La covariance utilisée pour l'optimisation est la covariance factorielle APT, construite dans le notebook 01. La covariance historique Ledoit-Wolf reste un diagnostic historique ; elle n'est pas l'input principal de l'optimisation.

Contrôle : OPTIMIZATION_INPUTS_USE_APT = PASSED uniquement si mu_APT et Sigma_APT couvrent les mêmes actifs, si la matrice est carrée, symétrique et PSD ou corrigée PSD avec justification.

In [3]:
required_input_files = {
    'apt_expected_returns_2025.csv': PROJECT_DIR / 'data' / 'exports' / 'optimization_inputs' / 'apt_expected_returns_2025.csv',
    'apt_covariance_matrix_2025.csv': PROJECT_DIR / 'data' / 'exports' / 'optimization_inputs' / 'apt_covariance_matrix_2025.csv',
    'apt_betas_2025.csv': PROJECT_DIR / 'data' / 'exports' / 'optimization_inputs' / 'apt_betas_2025.csv',
    'apt_factors_weekly_2025.csv': PROJECT_DIR / 'data' / 'exports' / 'optimization_inputs' / 'apt_factors_weekly_2025.csv',
    'apt_diagnostics_2025.csv': PROJECT_DIR / 'data' / 'exports' / 'optimization_inputs' / 'apt_diagnostics_2025.csv',
    'diagnostic_pre_optimisation_2025.xlsx': PROJECT_DIR / 'data' / 'exports' / 'diagnostic_pre_optimisation_2025.xlsx',
}
Input_Files_Check = pd.DataFrame([
    {'file_name': name, 'path': str(path), 'exists': path.exists()}
    for name, path in required_input_files.items()
])
INPUT_FILES_FOUND = 'PASSED' if Input_Files_Check['exists'].all() else 'FAILED'
if INPUT_FILES_FOUND != 'PASSED':
    display(Input_Files_Check)
    raise FileNotFoundError('Fichiers d’entrée requis manquants pour le notebook 02.')

data = load_apt_optimization_inputs(PROJECT_DIR)
Expected_Returns_APT = data['expected']
mu_APT = data['mu']
Sigma_APT = data['sigma']
Returns_Historical = data['returns']
rf_annual = float(data['rf_annual'])

universe = build_universe(data)
context = build_context(data, universe, PROJECT_DIR)
context['rf_annual'] = rf_annual
Optimization_Asset_Alignment = build_asset_alignment(data, universe)

sigma_values = Sigma_APT.to_numpy(float)
eigvals = np.linalg.eigvalsh(sigma_values)
apt_inputs_ok = (
    len(mu_APT) == Sigma_APT.shape[0] == Sigma_APT.shape[1]
    and list(mu_APT.index) == list(Sigma_APT.index) == list(Sigma_APT.columns)
    and np.allclose(sigma_values, sigma_values.T, atol=1e-10)
    and eigvals.min() >= -1e-8
    and Optimization_Asset_Alignment['final_status'].eq('OK').all()
)
OPTIMIZATION_INPUTS_USE_APT = 'PASSED' if apt_inputs_ok else 'FAILED'
Inputs_APT = pd.DataFrame([
    {'check_name':'mu_APT_available','status':'PASSED' if mu_APT.notna().all() else 'FAILED','details':f'{mu_APT.notna().sum()}/{len(mu_APT)} actifs'},
    {'check_name':'Sigma_APT_square','status':'PASSED' if Sigma_APT.shape[0] == Sigma_APT.shape[1] else 'FAILED','details':str(Sigma_APT.shape)},
    {'check_name':'Sigma_APT_symmetric','status':'PASSED' if np.allclose(sigma_values, sigma_values.T, atol=1e-10) else 'FAILED','details':'symétrie numérique'},
    {'check_name':'Sigma_APT_PSD','status':'PASSED' if eigvals.min() >= -1e-8 else 'FAILED','details':f'min_eigenvalue={eigvals.min():.3e}; repaired={data["sigma_repaired"]}'},
    {'check_name':'OPTIMIZATION_INPUTS_USE_APT','status':OPTIMIZATION_INPUTS_USE_APT,'details':'mu_APT et Sigma_APT sont les inputs principaux'},
])
if OPTIMIZATION_INPUTS_USE_APT != 'PASSED':
    display(Optimization_Asset_Alignment.loc[Optimization_Asset_Alignment['final_status'].ne('OK')])
    raise ValueError('Alignement APT incohérent : optimisation arrêtée.')

display(Inputs_APT)
display(Optimization_Asset_Alignment.head())
check_name status details
0 mu_APT_available PASSED 21/21 actifs
1 Sigma_APT_square PASSED (21, 21)
2 Sigma_APT_symmetric PASSED symétrie numérique
3 Sigma_APT_PSD PASSED min_eigenvalue=4.336e-06; repaired=False
4 OPTIMIZATION_INPUTS_USE_APT PASSED mu_APT et Sigma_APT sont les inputs principaux
asset_id asset_name present_in_portfolio present_in_mu_APT present_in_Sigma_APT present_in_returns present_in_constraints final_status

1 ATTIJARI_BANK ATTIJARI BANK True True True True True OK

Références scientifiques et financières des modèles d'optimisation¶

Les modèles s'appuient sur les références listées ci-dessous. Chaque modèle est utilisé comme outil d'aide à la décision, pas comme recommandation automatique.

In [4]:
Optimization_References = references_table()
display(Optimization_References)
reference bibliographic_note role
0 Markowitz 1952 Portfolio Selection. The Journal of Finance, 7... Minimum variance, moyenne-variance et frontièr...
1 Markowitz 1959 Portfolio Selection: Efficient Diversification... Diversification efficiente.
2 Sharpe 1966 Mutual Fund Performance. The Journal of Busine... Ratio de Sharpe.
3 Rockafellar & Uryasev 2000 Optimization of Conditional Value-at-Risk. Jou... Formulation Mean-CVaR.
4 Rockafellar & Uryasev 2002 Conditional Value-at-Risk for General Loss Dis... Fondement CVaR.
5 Maillard, Roncalli & Teiletche 2010 The Properties of Equally Weighted Risk Contri... Risk Parity / Equal Risk Contribution.
6 Lobo, Fazel & Boyd 2007 Portfolio Optimization with Linear and Fixed T... Pénalité de turnover.
7 Boyd & Vandenberghe 2004 Convex Optimization. Cambridge University Press. Optimisation convexe et contraintes.
8 Glasserman 2004 Monte Carlo Methods in Financial Engineering. ... Simulation Monte Carlo.
9 CFA Institute Quantitative Investment Analysis, 4th Edition. Mesures de risque et analyse quantitative.
10 Dachert et al. 2022 Multicriteria asset allocation in practice. OR... Allocation multi-objectif.
11 Braun, Schmeiser & Schreiber 2013 Portfolio Optimization Under Solvency II: Impl... Assurance, solvabilité et contraintes.

2. Contraintes communes¶

Les contraintes sont séparées selon leur origine : réglementation légale testable, gouvernance interne, qualité de données ou contrainte non testable faute de données. Les limites internes de poids par actif, par émetteur, par classe et le turnover ne sont pas présentées comme des contraintes légales.

Synthèse réglementaire : aucune violation n'est détectée sur les contraintes testables. Certaines contraintes réglementaires restent non testées faute de données détaillées ; la conclusion ne constitue donc pas une certification réglementaire exhaustive.

In [5]:
Regulatory_Constraints_Map = build_regulatory_constraints_map(referential_found=False)
Internal_Constraints_Map = build_internal_constraints_map(CONFIG)
current_weights = universe['current_weight_optimisable'].to_numpy(float)
current_weights = current_weights / current_weights.sum()
Current_Portfolio_Regulatory = evaluate_constraints(current_weights, universe, context, Regulatory_Constraints_Map, 'Current_Portfolio')

allowed_constraint_origins = {'LEGAL_REGULATORY','INTERNAL_GOVERNANCE','DATA_QUALITY','UNTESTED_MISSING_DATA'}
REGULATORY_CONSTRAINTS_CLARIFIED = 'PASSED' if (
    'constraint_origin' in Regulatory_Constraints_Map.columns
    and 'constraint_origin' in Internal_Constraints_Map.columns
    and set(Regulatory_Constraints_Map['constraint_origin']).issubset(allowed_constraint_origins)
    and set(Internal_Constraints_Map['constraint_origin']).issubset(allowed_constraint_origins)
    and Internal_Constraints_Map['constraint_origin'].eq('INTERNAL_GOVERNANCE').all()
) else 'FAILED'

display(Internal_Constraints_Map)
display(Regulatory_Constraints_Map)
display(Current_Portfolio_Regulatory.head(10))
print('Clarification des contraintes:', REGULATORY_CONSTRAINTS_CLARIFIED)
constraint_id description value hard_constraint constraint_origin

Clarification des contraintes: PASSED

3. Portefeuille actuel¶

Le portefeuille actuel sert de benchmark. Son rendement attendu est calculé avec mu_APT, sa volatilité avec Sigma_APT, et ses risques ex-post avec les rendements historiques alignés.

In [6]:
current_row, current_compliance = portfolio_metrics(
    'Current_Portfolio', current_weights, mu_APT, Sigma_APT, Returns_Historical,
    rf_annual, current_weights, universe, context, Regulatory_Constraints_Map, 'BENCHMARK'
)
Current_Portfolio = pd.DataFrame([current_row])
display(Current_Portfolio)
portfolio_name expected_return_APT volatility_APT variance_APT sharpe_ratio var_95_historical cvar_95_historical downside_deviation max_drawdown skewness kurtosis turnover herfindahl_index equity_weight state_weight corporate_weight active_constraints_count regulatory_status number_of_regulatory_breaches optimization_status
0 Current_Portfolio 0.106826 0.015454 0.000239 1.968308 0.000499 0.001023 0.004574 -0.002807 0.405013 2.551565 0.0 0.206067 0.121782 0.347356 0.530862 0 COMPLIANT_WITH_UNTESTED_CONSTRAINTS 0 BENCHMARK

4. Modèles déterministes¶

Modèles implémentés : Minimum Variance, Mean-Variance pour lambda = 2, 5, 10, 20, Maximum Return, Maximum Sharpe, Mean-CVaR, Risk Parity, et Mean-Variance avec pénalité de turnover.
Les modèles utilisent mu = mu_APT et Sigma = Sigma_APT. Les rendements historiques ne sont utilisés que pour les métriques VaR/CVaR, drawdown et downside deviation.

Références principales : Markowitz (1952, 1959), Sharpe (1966), Rockafellar & Uryasev (2000, 2002), Maillard et al. (2010), Lobo et al. (2007).

In [7]:
portfolios, Solver_Diagnostics = solve_all_models(mu_APT, Sigma_APT, Returns_Historical, universe, context, CONFIG)
Solver_Diagnostics
Out[7]:
portfolio_name success solver_status turnover_limit_used objective_value
0 Minimum_Variance True optimal 0.3 0.000078
1 Mean_Variance_lambda_2 True optimal 0.3 -0.113472
2 Mean_Variance_lambda_5 True optimal 0.3 -0.112140
3 Mean_Variance_lambda_10 True optimal 0.3 -0.110053
4 Mean_Variance_lambda_20 True optimal 0.3 -0.107835
5 Max_Return True optimal 0.3 -0.114633
6 MeanVariance_TurnoverPenalty True optimal 0.3 -0.098214
7 Mean_CVaR_95 True optimal 0.3 -0.010389
8 Max_Sharpe True Optimization terminated successfully 0.3 -3.485108
9 Risk_Parity True Optimization terminated successfully 0.3 0.000010

5. Monte Carlo 15 000 portefeuilles faisables¶

Méthode : simulations Dirichlet autour du portefeuille actuel, filtrées par les mêmes contraintes que les modèles déterministes, y compris le turnover maximal retenu.
Deux bases sont conservées : Monte_Carlo_All_Portfolios pour tous les tirages simulés et Monte_Carlo_Feasible_Portfolios pour les portefeuilles réellement admissibles.
Référence : Glasserman (2004) et CFA Institute.

In [8]:
Monte_Carlo_All_Portfolios, Monte_Carlo_Feasible_Portfolios, monte_carlo_weights = generate_monte_carlo(
    mu_APT, Sigma_APT, Returns_Historical, universe, context, Regulatory_Constraints_Map, rf_annual, CONFIG
)
if len(Monte_Carlo_Feasible_Portfolios) < CONFIG.monte_carlo_required:
    Monte_Carlo_Feasible_Portfolios['quality_flag'] = 'MONTE_CARLO_FEASIBLE_PORTFOLIOS_LOW'
else:
    Monte_Carlo_Feasible_Portfolios['quality_flag'] = 'OK'

for label, idx_func in {
    'Monte_Carlo_Max_Sharpe': lambda df: df['sharpe'].idxmax(),
    'Monte_Carlo_Min_Volatility': lambda df: df['volatility'].idxmin(),
    'Monte_Carlo_Max_Return': lambda df: df['expected_return'].idxmax(),
}.items():
    idx = int(idx_func(Monte_Carlo_Feasible_Portfolios))
    pid = str(int(Monte_Carlo_Feasible_Portfolios.loc[idx, 'portfolio_id']))
    portfolios[label] = monte_carlo_weights[pid]

display(Monte_Carlo_Feasible_Portfolios.head())
print('Portefeuilles Monte Carlo simulés:', len(Monte_Carlo_All_Portfolios))
print('Portefeuilles Monte Carlo faisables:', len(Monte_Carlo_Feasible_Portfolios))
print('Turnover maximal faisable:', Monte_Carlo_Feasible_Portfolios['turnover'].max())
portfolio_id expected_return volatility variance sharpe var_95 cvar_95 max_drawdown turnover turnover_limit_used compliance_status feasibility_status feasibility_reason weights_json quality_flag

2 7 0.107748 0.019781 0.000391 1.584356 0.000657 0.001157 -0.002964 0.267598 0.3 COMPLIANT_WITH_UNTESTED_CONSTRAINTS FEASIBLE OK {"BTA_7_4_02_2030": 0.09933200274492245, "BTA_... OK
3 9 0.106819 0.016830 0.000283 1.806953 0.000685 0.001178 -0.003478 0.258962 0.3 COMPLIANT_WITH_UNTESTED_CONSTRAINTS FEASIBLE OK {"BTA_7_4_02_2030": 0.11458207196451961, "BTA_... OK
4 13 0.107113 0.018575 0.000345 1.653007 0.000791 0.001344 -0.004501 0.286525 0.3 COMPLIANT_WITH_UNTESTED_CONSTRAINTS FEASIBLE OK {"BTA_7_4_02_2030": 0.11139123492117578, "BTA_... OK 
Portefeuilles Monte Carlo simulés: 35419
Portefeuilles Monte Carlo faisables: 15000
Turnover maximal faisable: 0.29999927189910713

6. Frontière efficiente validée¶

Pour chaque rendement cible, le notebook minimise w' Sigma_APT w sous les mêmes contraintes que les autres modèles : mêmes actifs, mêmes bornes, mêmes contraintes réglementaires testables et même limite de turnover.
Un point n'est conservé comme valide que si le solveur réussit, si le rendement cible est atteint et si les contraintes sont respectées.
Référence : Markowitz (1952, 1959).

In [9]:
frontier_target_returns = [float(mu_APT.to_numpy(float) @ np.asarray(w, dtype=float)) for w in portfolios.values()]
Efficient_Frontier = solve_efficient_frontier(mu_APT, Sigma_APT, universe, context, rf_annual, CONFIG, target_returns=frontier_target_returns)
Efficient_Frontier['frontier_valid'] = (
    Efficient_Frontier['feasibility_status'].eq('VALID')
    & Efficient_Frontier['optimization_status'].eq('success')
    & (Efficient_Frontier['return_gap'] <= 1e-4)
)
Efficient_Frontier_Valid = Efficient_Frontier.loc[Efficient_Frontier['frontier_valid']].copy()

display(Efficient_Frontier.head())
print('Points valides:', len(Efficient_Frontier_Valid))
target_return achieved_return volatility variance sharpe return_gap turnover_limit_used optimization_status feasibility_status weights_json frontier_valid
0 0.106689 0.106696 0.008820 0.000078 3.433997 0.0 0.3 success VALID {"BTA_7_4_02_2030": 0.09810958639046843, "BTA_... True
1 0.106826 0.106826 0.008821 0.000078 3.448322 0.0 0.3 success VALID {"BTA_7_4_02_2030": 0.09810902529054005, "BTA_... True
2 0.106851 0.106851 0.008821 0.000078 3.451032 0.0 0.3 success VALID {"BTA_7_4_02_2030": 0.09810901203763563, "BTA_... True
3 0.107013 0.107013 0.008826 0.000078 3.467801 0.0 0.3 success VALID {"BTA_7_4_02_2030": 0.098116031195893, "BTA_7_... True
4 0.107022 0.107022 0.008826 0.000078 3.468787 0.0 0.3 success VALID {"BTA_7_4_02_2030": 0.0981090812531121, "BTA_7... True 
Points valides: 61

7. Métriques, conformité et scoring multicritère d'aide à la décision¶

Les métriques comparent le rendement attendu APT, la volatilité APT, le ratio de Sharpe, la VaR/CVaR historique, le drawdown, le turnover, la concentration et les contrôles réglementaires sur le portefeuille total.

Aucune violation n'a été détectée sur les contraintes testables lorsque le statut est COMPLIANT_WITH_UNTESTED_CONSTRAINTS. Certaines contraintes réglementaires restent non testées faute de données détaillées. Le résultat ne doit donc pas être interprété comme une certification exhaustive de conformité réglementaire.

Le scoring multicritère compare les portefeuilles candidats ; il n'explore pas toute la frontière Pareto. Les pondérations sont des hypothèses de gouvernance et servent à sélectionner une allocation prudente et défendable.

La VaR et la CVaR sont calculées sur les rendements hebdomadaires historiques de la poche optimisable. Elles sont exprimées en pertes positives : par exemple 0.012 signifie une perte hebdomadaire de 1,2 %.

In [10]:
summary_rows = []
reg_reports = []
risk_tables = []
for name, w in portfolios.items():
    status = 'SOLVED' if name == 'Current_Portfolio' else Solver_Diagnostics.set_index('portfolio_name')['solver_status'].to_dict().get(name, 'MONTE_CARLO_SELECTED')
    row, comp = portfolio_metrics(name, w, mu_APT, Sigma_APT, Returns_Historical, rf_annual, current_weights, universe, context, Regulatory_Constraints_Map, status)
    summary_rows.append(row)
    reg_reports.append(comp)
    risk_tables.append(risk_contributions(name, w, Sigma_APT, universe))

Optimization_Comparison = pd.DataFrame(summary_rows)
Regulatory_Checks = pd.concat(reg_reports, ignore_index=True)
Risk_Contributions = pd.concat(risk_tables, ignore_index=True)
min_var_vol = float(Optimization_Comparison.loc[Optimization_Comparison['portfolio_name'].eq('Minimum_Variance'), 'volatility_APT'].iloc[0])
frontier_min_vol = float(Efficient_Frontier_Valid['volatility'].min()) if not Efficient_Frontier_Valid.empty else np.nan
frontier_consistent = bool(np.isfinite(frontier_min_vol) and np.isfinite(min_var_vol) and frontier_min_vol >= min_var_vol - 1e-6)
FRONTIER_CONSISTENCY = 'PASSED' if frontier_consistent else 'FAILED'
FRONTIER_VALIDATED = 'PASSED' if frontier_consistent and len(Efficient_Frontier_Valid) > 0 else 'FAILED'
frontier_warning = 'OK' if frontier_consistent else 'FRONTIER_INCONSISTENT_WITH_MIN_VARIANCE'
print('Vol min frontière:', frontier_min_vol)
print('Vol Minimum Variance:', min_var_vol)
print('Contrôle frontière:', FRONTIER_VALIDATED, frontier_warning)

Optimization_Comparison['VaR_95_historical'] = Optimization_Comparison['var_95_historical']
Optimization_Comparison['CVaR_95_historical'] = Optimization_Comparison['cvar_95_historical']
Optimization_Comparison['HHI_concentration'] = Optimization_Comparison['herfindahl_index']
Optimization_Comparison['sovereign_bond_weight'] = Optimization_Comparison['state_weight']
Optimization_Comparison['warning_flags'] = np.where(
    Optimization_Comparison['optimization_status'].astype(str).str.contains('SUSPICIOUS_ZERO_VAR_CVAR'),
    'SUSPICIOUS_ZERO_VAR_CVAR',
    'OK'
)

def summarize_regulatory_checks(regulatory_checks):
    summary = regulatory_checks.groupby('portfolio_name').agg(
        tested_constraints_count=('compliance_status', lambda s: int((s != 'CHECK_NOT_ENFORCED_MISSING_DATA').sum())),
        untested_constraints_count=('compliance_status', lambda s: int((s == 'CHECK_NOT_ENFORCED_MISSING_DATA').sum())),
        breaches_count=('compliance_status', lambda s: int((s == 'BREACH').sum())),
    ).reset_index()
    summary['regulatory_status'] = np.select(
        [summary['breaches_count'] > 0, summary['untested_constraints_count'] > 0],
        ['BREACH_DETECTED', 'COMPLIANT_WITH_UNTESTED_CONSTRAINTS'],
        default='COMPLIANT_TESTABLE_CONSTRAINTS'
    )
    summary['comments'] = np.where(
        summary['untested_constraints_count'] > 0,
        "Aucune violation détectée sur les contraintes testables ; certaines contraintes restent non testées faute de données détaillées.",
        "Toutes les contraintes testables disponibles sont respectées."
    )
    return summary

Regulatory_Checks_Summary = summarize_regulatory_checks(Regulatory_Checks)
Optimization_Comparison = Optimization_Comparison.drop(columns=['regulatory_status'], errors='ignore').merge(
    Regulatory_Checks_Summary[['portfolio_name','regulatory_status']], on='portfolio_name', how='left'
)

candidate_rows = Optimization_Comparison.loc[~Optimization_Comparison['regulatory_status'].eq('BREACH_DETECTED')].copy()
if not Monte_Carlo_Feasible_Portfolios.empty:
    mc_sample = Monte_Carlo_Feasible_Portfolios.nlargest(500, 'sharpe').copy()
    mc_rows = []
    for _, mc in mc_sample.iterrows():
        w = np.array(list(json.loads(mc['weights_json']).values()), dtype=float)
        row, _ = portfolio_metrics(f"MC_candidate_{int(mc['portfolio_id'])}", w, mu_APT, Sigma_APT, Returns_Historical, rf_annual, current_weights, universe, context, Regulatory_Constraints_Map, 'MONTE_CARLO_CANDIDATE')
        if row['regulatory_status'] != 'BREACH_DETECTED':
            mc_rows.append(row)
    if mc_rows:
        candidate_rows = pd.concat([candidate_rows, pd.DataFrame(mc_rows)], ignore_index=True)
for i, fr in Efficient_Frontier_Valid.iterrows():
    if isinstance(fr.get('weights_json'), str) and fr['weights_json']:
        w = np.array(list(json.loads(fr['weights_json']).values()), dtype=float)
        row, _ = portfolio_metrics(f"Frontier_candidate_{i}", w, mu_APT, Sigma_APT, Returns_Historical, rf_annual, current_weights, universe, context, Regulatory_Constraints_Map, 'FRONTIER_CANDIDATE')
        if row['regulatory_status'] != 'BREACH_DETECTED':
            candidate_rows = pd.concat([candidate_rows, pd.DataFrame([row])], ignore_index=True)

MultiObjective_Scores = build_multiobjective_scores(candidate_rows)
Final_Recommendation = final_recommendation(MultiObjective_Scores)

def resolve_portfolio_weights(portfolio_name):
    if portfolio_name in portfolios:
        return portfolios[portfolio_name]
    if isinstance(portfolio_name, str) and portfolio_name.startswith('MC_candidate_'):
        portfolio_id = portfolio_name.replace('MC_candidate_', '')
        match = Monte_Carlo_Feasible_Portfolios.loc[Monte_Carlo_Feasible_Portfolios['portfolio_id'].astype(str).eq(portfolio_id)]
        if not match.empty:
            return np.array(list(json.loads(match.iloc[0]['weights_json']).values()), dtype=float)
    if isinstance(portfolio_name, str) and portfolio_name.startswith('Frontier_candidate_'):
        idx = int(portfolio_name.replace('Frontier_candidate_', ''))
        if idx in Efficient_Frontier.index and isinstance(Efficient_Frontier.loc[idx, 'weights_json'], str):
            return np.array(list(json.loads(Efficient_Frontier.loc[idx, 'weights_json']).values()), dtype=float)
    return None

recommended_weights = None
if not Final_Recommendation.empty and pd.notna(Final_Recommendation.iloc[0].get('portfolio_name')):
    recommended_source = str(Final_Recommendation.iloc[0]['portfolio_name'])
    Final_Recommendation['recommendation_note'] = "Recommandation issue d'un scoring multicritère, non d'un solveur Pareto exact."
    Final_Recommendation['recommended_portfolio_name'] = 'MultiCriteria_Recommended_Portfolio'
    recommended_weights = resolve_portfolio_weights(recommended_source)
    if recommended_weights is not None:
        portfolios['MultiCriteria_Recommended_Portfolio'] = recommended_weights
        rec_row, rec_comp = portfolio_metrics(
            'MultiCriteria_Recommended_Portfolio', recommended_weights, mu_APT, Sigma_APT,
            Returns_Historical, rf_annual, current_weights, universe, context,
            Regulatory_Constraints_Map, f'SCORING_SOURCE={recommended_source}'
        )
        Optimization_Comparison = pd.concat([Optimization_Comparison, pd.DataFrame([rec_row])], ignore_index=True)
        Regulatory_Checks = pd.concat([Regulatory_Checks, rec_comp], ignore_index=True)
        Risk_Contributions = pd.concat([Risk_Contributions, risk_contributions('MultiCriteria_Recommended_Portfolio', recommended_weights, Sigma_APT, universe)], ignore_index=True)

Regulatory_Checks_Summary = summarize_regulatory_checks(Regulatory_Checks)
Optimization_Comparison = Optimization_Comparison.drop(columns=['regulatory_status'], errors='ignore').merge(
    Regulatory_Checks_Summary[['portfolio_name','regulatory_status']], on='portfolio_name', how='left'
)
for src, dst in [('var_95_historical','VaR_95_historical'), ('cvar_95_historical','CVaR_95_historical'), ('herfindahl_index','HHI_concentration'), ('state_weight','sovereign_bond_weight')]:
    Optimization_Comparison[dst] = Optimization_Comparison[src]
Optimization_Comparison['warning_flags'] = np.where(
    Optimization_Comparison['optimization_status'].astype(str).str.contains('SUSPICIOUS_ZERO_VAR_CVAR'),
    'SUSPICIOUS_ZERO_VAR_CVAR',
    'OK'
)


def weekly_loss_metrics(weights):
    scenario_returns = Returns_Historical.to_numpy(float) @ np.asarray(weights, dtype=float)
    q05 = float(np.quantile(scenario_returns, 0.05))
    var_loss = max(0.0, -q05)
    tail = scenario_returns[scenario_returns <= q05]
    cvar_loss = max(0.0, -float(tail.mean())) if len(tail) else var_loss
    return var_loss, cvar_loss

weekly_var_rows = []
for pname, weights in portfolios.items():
    var_loss, cvar_loss = weekly_loss_metrics(weights)
    weekly_var_rows.append({'portfolio_name': pname, 'VaR_95_weekly_loss': var_loss, 'CVaR_95_weekly_loss': cvar_loss})
VaR_CVaR_Convention = pd.DataFrame(weekly_var_rows)
VaR_CVaR_Convention['calculation_horizon'] = 'weekly_historical_returns'
VaR_CVaR_Convention['sign_convention'] = 'positive_loss'
VaR_CVaR_Convention['formula_var'] = 'VaR_95_weekly_loss = -quantile(returns, 5%)'
VaR_CVaR_Convention['formula_cvar'] = 'CVaR_95_weekly_loss = -mean(returns <= quantile_5%)'
Optimization_Comparison = Optimization_Comparison.merge(VaR_CVaR_Convention[['portfolio_name','VaR_95_weekly_loss','CVaR_95_weekly_loss']], on='portfolio_name', how='left')
Optimization_Comparison['economic_review_flag'] = np.where(Optimization_Comparison['sharpe_ratio'] > 3.0, 'HIGH_SHARPE_REQUIRES_ECONOMIC_REVIEW', 'OK')
VAR_CVAR_CONVENTION_CLARIFIED = 'PASSED' if (VaR_CVaR_Convention['CVaR_95_weekly_loss'] + 1e-12 >= VaR_CVaR_Convention['VaR_95_weekly_loss']).all() else 'FAILED'

Risk_Return_Comparison = Optimization_Comparison[[
    'portfolio_name','expected_return_APT','volatility_APT','variance_APT','sharpe_ratio',
    'VaR_95_historical','CVaR_95_historical','VaR_95_weekly_loss','CVaR_95_weekly_loss','downside_deviation','max_drawdown','turnover',
    'HHI_concentration','regulatory_status','number_of_regulatory_breaches','optimization_status','warning_flags','economic_review_flag'
]].copy()

Optimized_Weights = optimized_weights_table(portfolios, universe, context)
model_order_required = [
    'Current_Portfolio','Minimum_Variance','Mean_Variance_lambda_2','Mean_Variance_lambda_5',
    'Mean_Variance_lambda_10','Mean_Variance_lambda_20','Max_Sharpe','Max_Return',
    'Mean_CVaR_95','Risk_Parity','MeanVariance_TurnoverPenalty','MultiCriteria_Recommended_Portfolio'
]
model_order = [m for m in model_order_required if m in Optimized_Weights['portfolio_name'].unique()]
class_order = {'listed_equity': 0, 'government_bond': 1, 'corporate_bond': 2}
current_order = Optimized_Weights.loc[Optimized_Weights['portfolio_name'].eq('Current_Portfolio'), ['asset_name','asset_class','optimized_weight']].copy()
current_order['class_rank'] = current_order['asset_class'].map(class_order).fillna(9)
current_order = current_order.sort_values(['class_rank','optimized_weight','asset_name'], ascending=[True, False, True])
asset_order = current_order['asset_name'].tolist()
Weights_By_Model_Long = Optimized_Weights.loc[Optimized_Weights['portfolio_name'].isin(model_order), [
    'portfolio_name','asset_name','asset_class','issuer','optimized_weight'
]].rename(columns={'optimized_weight': 'weight'}).copy()
Weights_By_Model_Long['portfolio_name'] = pd.Categorical(Weights_By_Model_Long['portfolio_name'], categories=model_order, ordered=True)
Weights_By_Model_Long['asset_name'] = pd.Categorical(Weights_By_Model_Long['asset_name'], categories=asset_order, ordered=True)
Weights_By_Model_Long = Weights_By_Model_Long.sort_values(['asset_name','portfolio_name']).reset_index(drop=True)
Weights_By_Model_Matrix = Weights_By_Model_Long.pivot_table(index='asset_name', columns='portfolio_name', values='weight', aggfunc='sum', observed=False).reindex(index=asset_order, columns=model_order).fillna(0.0).reset_index()

class_label_map = {
    'listed_equity': 'Actions cotées',
    'government_bond': "Titres d'État",
    'corporate_bond': 'Obligations corporate',
}
Weights_By_Model_Long['asset_class_label'] = Weights_By_Model_Long['asset_class'].map(class_label_map).fillna(Weights_By_Model_Long['asset_class'])

def check_portfolio_vs_frontier(portfolio_return, portfolio_volatility, frontier_valid, tolerance=1e-4):
    if frontier_valid.empty or not np.isfinite(portfolio_return) or not np.isfinite(portfolio_volatility):
        return np.nan, np.nan, np.nan, 'FRONTIER_NOT_AVAILABLE', 'Frontière valide indisponible.'
    ordered = frontier_valid.sort_values('achieved_return').reset_index(drop=True)
    exact = ordered.loc[(ordered['achieved_return'] - portfolio_return).abs() <= tolerance]
    if not exact.empty:
        nearest = exact.iloc[(exact['achieved_return'] - portfolio_return).abs().argmin()]
    else:
        eligible = ordered.loc[ordered['achieved_return'] >= portfolio_return - tolerance]
        nearest = eligible.iloc[0] if not eligible.empty else ordered.iloc[-1]
    gap = float(portfolio_volatility - nearest['volatility'])
    status = 'MODEL_BELOW_FRONTIER_SUSPICIOUS' if gap < -tolerance else 'OK'
    comment = 'Volatilité du modèle inférieure à la frontière au rendement comparable.' if status != 'OK' else 'Cohérent avec la frontière validée ou dans la tolérance numérique.'
    return float(nearest['achieved_return']), float(nearest['volatility']), gap, status, comment

frontier_rows = []
for _, row in Optimization_Comparison.iterrows():
    nearest_ret, nearest_vol, vol_gap, status, comment = check_portfolio_vs_frontier(row['expected_return_APT'], row['volatility_APT'], Efficient_Frontier_Valid)
    frontier_rows.append({
        'portfolio_name': row['portfolio_name'],
        'expected_return_APT': row['expected_return_APT'],
        'volatility_APT': row['volatility_APT'],
        'nearest_frontier_return': nearest_ret,
        'nearest_frontier_volatility': nearest_vol,
        'volatility_gap': vol_gap,
        'status': status,
        'comment': comment,
    })
Frontier_Model_Consistency_Check = pd.DataFrame(frontier_rows)
models_below_frontier_count = int(Frontier_Model_Consistency_Check['status'].eq('MODEL_BELOW_FRONTIER_SUSPICIOUS').sum())

Constraints_Active = Regulatory_Checks.loc[Regulatory_Checks['compliance_status'].isin(['BREACH','CHECK_NOT_ENFORCED_MISSING_DATA'])].copy()
display(Optimization_Comparison.sort_values('sharpe_ratio', ascending=False))
display(Regulatory_Checks_Summary)
display(Weights_By_Model_Matrix)
display(Frontier_Model_Consistency_Check)
if not Final_Recommendation.empty:
    display(Final_Recommendation[['portfolio_name','recommended_portfolio_name','final_score','recommendation_status','recommendation_note']].head())

8 Mean_CVaR_95 MultiCriteria_Recommended_Portfolio 0.589361 SELECTED_BY_MULTICRITERIA_SCORING_NOT_PARETO_S... Recommandation issue d'un scoring multicritère...

Validation réglementaire renforcée et covariance utilisée¶

Le contrôle réglementaire est réalisé sur le portefeuille total. Les contraintes non testables faute de données sont isolées et ne sont pas assimilées à des contraintes respectées.

La covariance APT est retenue comme matrice principale car elle réduit le bruit d’estimation sur un historique court et reste cohérente avec les rendements attendus APT. La covariance empirique et la covariance Ledoit-Wolf sont conservées comme matrices de contrôle.

In [11]:
COVARIANCE_SOURCE = "APT"

allowed_constraint_origins = {'LEGAL_REGULATORY', 'INTERNAL_GOVERNANCE', 'DATA_QUALITY', 'UNTESTED_MISSING_DATA'}
allowed_implementation_status = {
    'ENFORCED_IN_OPTIMIZATION',
    'CHECKED_POST_OPTIMIZATION',
    'CHECK_NOT_ENFORCED_MISSING_DATA',
    'INTERNAL_LIMIT',
    'INFORMATION_ONLY',
}


def _normalize_regulatory_config(regulatory_map, internal_map):
    regulatory_rows = []
    for _, row in regulatory_map.iterrows():
        impl = row.get('implementation_status', 'CHECKED_POST_OPTIMIZATION')
        testable = impl != 'CHECK_NOT_ENFORCED_MISSING_DATA'
        regulatory_rows.append({
            'constraint_id': row.get('constraint_id'),
            'constraint_name': row.get('constraint_name', row.get('constraint_id')),
            'origin': row.get('constraint_origin', 'LEGAL_REGULATORY') if testable else 'UNTESTED_MISSING_DATA',
            'scope': row.get('scope', 'portefeuille_total'),
            'constraint_type': row.get('threshold_type', row.get('constraint_type', 'regulatory_limit')),
            'asset_class': row.get('applies_to', row.get('asset_class', '')),
            'sub_class': row.get('sub_class', ''),
            'issuer': row.get('issuer', ''),
            'threshold_pct': row.get('threshold_value', row.get('limit_pct', np.nan)),
            'denominator': row.get('denominator', 'technical_provisions'),
            'hard_constraint': bool(row.get('hard_constraint', testable)),
            'testable': bool(testable),
            'data_required': row.get('data_required', ''),
            'missing_data': row.get('missing_data', '' if testable else row.get('data_required', 'data_missing')),
            'implementation_status': impl if impl in allowed_implementation_status else ('CHECKED_POST_OPTIMIZATION' if testable else 'CHECK_NOT_ENFORCED_MISSING_DATA'),
            'comment': row.get('comment', ''),
        })
    internal_rows = []
    for _, row in internal_map.iterrows():
        internal_rows.append({
            'constraint_id': row.get('constraint_id'),
            'constraint_name': row.get('constraint_name', row.get('description', row.get('constraint_id'))),
            'origin': 'INTERNAL_GOVERNANCE',
            'scope': row.get('scope', 'poche_optimisable'),
            'constraint_type': row.get('threshold_type', row.get('constraint_type', 'internal_limit')),
            'asset_class': row.get('applies_to', row.get('asset_class', '')),
            'sub_class': row.get('sub_class', ''),
            'issuer': row.get('issuer', ''),
            'threshold_pct': row.get('threshold_value', row.get('limit_pct', np.nan)),
            'denominator': row.get('denominator', 'optimisable_pocket'),
            'hard_constraint': bool(row.get('hard_constraint', True)),
            'testable': True,
            'data_required': row.get('data_required', 'portfolio_weights'),
            'missing_data': '',
            'implementation_status': 'INTERNAL_LIMIT',
            'comment': row.get('comment', 'Limite interne de gouvernance, non assimilée à une contrainte réglementaire.'),
        })
    out = pd.DataFrame(regulatory_rows + internal_rows)
    out['origin'] = out['origin'].where(out['origin'].isin(allowed_constraint_origins), 'UNTESTED_MISSING_DATA')
    out['implementation_status'] = out['implementation_status'].where(
        out['implementation_status'].isin(allowed_implementation_status),
        'INFORMATION_ONLY',
    )
    return out


regulatory_constraints_config = _normalize_regulatory_config(Regulatory_Constraints_Map, Internal_Constraints_Map)


def _status_to_total_report(comp):
    out = comp.copy()
    out['origin'] = out.get('constraint_origin', out.get('origin', 'LEGAL_REGULATORY')).fillna('LEGAL_REGULATORY')
    out['origin'] = np.where(out['compliance_status'].eq('CHECK_NOT_ENFORCED_MISSING_DATA'), 'UNTESTED_MISSING_DATA', out['origin'])
    out['status'] = out['compliance_status'].map({
        'COMPLIANT': 'OK',
        'BREACH': 'BREACH',
        'CHECK_NOT_ENFORCED_MISSING_DATA': 'NOT_TESTED_DATA_MISSING',
    }).fillna('WARNING')
    out['severity'] = np.select(
        [out['status'].eq('BREACH'), out['status'].eq('NOT_TESTED_DATA_MISSING')],
        ['CRITICAL', 'WARNING'],
        default='INFO',
    )
    out['margin_value'] = np.where(
        out['status'].eq('OK'),
        out['threshold_value'] - out['exposure_value'],
        -out['breach_amount'].fillna(0.0),
    )
    out['margin_pct'] = out['margin_value'] / out['denominator_value'].replace(0, np.nan)
    out['comment'] = np.where(
        out['status'].eq('NOT_TESTED_DATA_MISSING'),
        'Contrainte non testée faute de données détaillées ; elle n’est pas assimilée à une conformité.',
        'Contrainte testable contrôlée sur le portefeuille total.',
    )
    cols = [
        'portfolio_name','constraint_id','constraint_name','origin','exposure_value','threshold_value',
        'margin_value','margin_pct','status','severity','implementation_status','comment'
    ]
    return out[cols]


def check_total_portfolio_constraints(weights_optimizable, portfolio_name):
    """Reconstruit le portefeuille total et contrôle les contraintes testables et non testables."""
    weights = np.asarray(weights_optimizable, dtype=float)
    comp = evaluate_constraints(weights, universe, context, Regulatory_Constraints_Map, portfolio_name)
    report = _status_to_total_report(comp)

    v_opt = float(context['optimisable_value'])
    turnover = float(np.abs(weights - current_weights).sum())
    internal_rows = [
        {
            'portfolio_name': portfolio_name,
            'constraint_id': 'INTERNAL_NO_SHORT_SELLING',
            'constraint_name': 'Absence de vente à découvert',
            'origin': 'INTERNAL_GOVERNANCE',
            'exposure_value': float(weights.min()),
            'threshold_value': 0.0,
            'margin_value': float(weights.min()),
            'margin_pct': np.nan,
            'status': 'OK' if weights.min() >= -1e-8 else 'BREACH',
            'severity': 'INFO' if weights.min() >= -1e-8 else 'CRITICAL',
            'implementation_status': 'INTERNAL_LIMIT',
            'comment': 'Contrôle interne appliqué à la poche optimisable.',
        },
        {
            'portfolio_name': portfolio_name,
            'constraint_id': 'INTERNAL_FULL_INVESTMENT',
            'constraint_name': 'Somme des poids optimisables égale à 100%',
            'origin': 'INTERNAL_GOVERNANCE',
            'exposure_value': float(weights.sum()),
            'threshold_value': 1.0,
            'margin_value': float(1.0 - abs(weights.sum() - 1.0)),
            'margin_pct': np.nan,
            'status': 'OK' if abs(weights.sum() - 1.0) <= 1e-6 else 'BREACH',
            'severity': 'INFO' if abs(weights.sum() - 1.0) <= 1e-6 else 'CRITICAL',
            'implementation_status': 'INTERNAL_LIMIT',
            'comment': 'Contrôle interne appliqué à la poche optimisable.',
        },
        {
            'portfolio_name': portfolio_name,
            'constraint_id': 'INTERNAL_TURNOVER_MAX_30',
            'constraint_name': 'Turnover maximum de gouvernance',
            'origin': 'INTERNAL_GOVERNANCE',
            'exposure_value': turnover,
            'threshold_value': CONFIG.primary_turnover_limit,
            'margin_value': CONFIG.primary_turnover_limit - turnover,
            'margin_pct': np.nan,
            'status': 'OK' if turnover <= CONFIG.primary_turnover_limit + 1e-8 else 'WARNING',
            'severity': 'INFO' if turnover <= CONFIG.primary_turnover_limit + 1e-8 else 'WARNING',
            'implementation_status': 'INTERNAL_LIMIT',
            'comment': 'Limite interne de réallocation, non réglementaire.',
        },
        {
            'portfolio_name': portfolio_name,
            'constraint_id': 'INTERNAL_MAX_ASSET_WEIGHT',
            'constraint_name': 'Poids maximum par actif',
            'origin': 'INTERNAL_GOVERNANCE',
            'exposure_value': float(weights.max()),
            'threshold_value': CONFIG.max_weight_per_asset,
            'margin_value': CONFIG.max_weight_per_asset - float(weights.max()),
            'margin_pct': np.nan,
            'status': 'OK' if weights.max() <= CONFIG.max_weight_per_asset + 1e-8 else 'WARNING',
            'severity': 'INFO' if weights.max() <= CONFIG.max_weight_per_asset + 1e-8 else 'WARNING',
            'implementation_status': 'INTERNAL_LIMIT',
            'comment': 'Limite interne de concentration, non réglementaire.',
        },
    ]
    return pd.concat([report, pd.DataFrame(internal_rows)], ignore_index=True)


regulatory_check_by_portfolio = pd.concat(
    [check_total_portfolio_constraints(w, name) for name, w in portfolios.items()],
    ignore_index=True,
)

tested_constraints_count = int(regulatory_check_by_portfolio.loc[~regulatory_check_by_portfolio['status'].eq('NOT_TESTED_DATA_MISSING'), 'constraint_id'].nunique())
untested_constraints_count = int(regulatory_check_by_portfolio.loc[regulatory_check_by_portfolio['status'].eq('NOT_TESTED_DATA_MISSING'), 'constraint_id'].nunique())
breaches_count = int(regulatory_check_by_portfolio['status'].eq('BREACH').sum())
warnings_count = int(regulatory_check_by_portfolio['status'].isin(['WARNING','NOT_TESTED_DATA_MISSING']).sum())
regulatory_conclusion = (
    "Aucune violation n’a été détectée sur les contraintes testables. Certaines contraintes restent non testées faute de données détaillées ; "
    "cette conclusion ne constitue pas une certification réglementaire exhaustive."
)

regulatory_scope_summary = pd.DataFrame([
    {'item': 'total_portfolio_value', 'value': context['total_value'], 'comment': 'Valeur totale du portefeuille utilisée comme base économique.'},
    {'item': 'optimizable_pocket_value', 'value': context['optimisable_value'], 'comment': 'Poche arbitrable réallouée par les modèles.'},
    {'item': 'frozen_pocket_value', 'value': float(context['total_value']) - float(context['optimisable_value']), 'comment': 'Poche non optimisable conservée à sa valeur actuelle.'},
    {'item': 'technical_provisions', 'value': context['technical_provisions'], 'comment': 'Dénominateur réglementaire disponible dans les données.'},
    {'item': 'tested_constraints_count', 'value': tested_constraints_count, 'comment': 'Nombre de contraintes testables distinctes.'},
    {'item': 'untested_constraints_count', 'value': untested_constraints_count, 'comment': 'Contraintes isolées faute de données détaillées.'},
    {'item': 'breaches_count', 'value': breaches_count, 'comment': 'Violations détectées sur contraintes testables.'},
    {'item': 'warnings_count', 'value': warnings_count, 'comment': 'Warnings incluant les contraintes non testées.'},
    {'item': 'regulatory_conclusion', 'value': regulatory_conclusion, 'comment': 'Conclusion prudente, sans certification réglementaire exhaustive.'},
])

eigvals = np.linalg.eigvalsh(Sigma_APT.to_numpy(float))
covariance_source_summary = pd.DataFrame([{
    'covariance_source': COVARIANCE_SOURCE,
    'nb_assets': len(Sigma_APT),
    'min_eigenvalue': float(eigvals.min()),
    'condition_number': float(np.linalg.cond(Sigma_APT.to_numpy(float))),
    'has_nan': bool(Sigma_APT.isna().any().any()),
    'is_psd': bool(eigvals.min() >= -1e-8),
    'recommended_use': 'Matrice principale pour optimisation' if COVARIANCE_SOURCE == 'APT' else 'Matrice de contrôle',
    'comment': "Covariance factorielle APT cohérente avec les rendements attendus APT du notebook 01.",
}])

portfolio_plausibility_checks = Optimization_Comparison.copy()
portfolio_plausibility_checks = portfolio_plausibility_checks.rename(columns={
    'expected_return_APT': 'expected_return_annualized',
    'volatility_APT': 'volatility_annualized',
    'VaR_95_weekly_loss': 'var_loss_95',
    'CVaR_95_weekly_loss': 'cvar_loss_95',
})
portfolio_plausibility_checks['high_sharpe_flag'] = portfolio_plausibility_checks['sharpe_ratio'] > 3.0
portfolio_plausibility_checks['low_volatility_flag'] = portfolio_plausibility_checks['volatility_annualized'] < 0.005
portfolio_plausibility_checks['zero_tail_risk_flag'] = (
    portfolio_plausibility_checks['var_loss_95'].fillna(0) <= 1e-8
) | (
    portfolio_plausibility_checks['cvar_loss_95'].fillna(0) <= 1e-8
)
portfolio_plausibility_checks['interpretation'] = np.select(
    [
        portfolio_plausibility_checks['high_sharpe_flag'] | portfolio_plausibility_checks['low_volatility_flag'],
        portfolio_plausibility_checks['zero_tail_risk_flag'],
    ],
    [
        "Sharpe élevé ou volatilité très faible : revue économique complémentaire nécessaire.",
        "Risque de queue proche de zéro : la mesure historique peut sous-estimer le risque.",
    ],
    default="Aucun signal de plausibilité critique selon les seuils retenus.",
)
portfolio_plausibility_checks = portfolio_plausibility_checks[[
    'portfolio_name','expected_return_annualized','volatility_annualized','sharpe_ratio',
    'var_loss_95','cvar_loss_95','max_drawdown','turnover','high_sharpe_flag','low_volatility_flag',
    'zero_tail_risk_flag','interpretation'
]]

REGULATORY_SCOPE_CLARIFIED = 'PASSED' if not regulatory_scope_summary.empty else 'FAILED'
UNTESTED_CONSTRAINTS_EXPLICIT = 'PASSED' if (
    'CHECK_NOT_ENFORCED_MISSING_DATA' in regulatory_constraints_config.to_string()
    and (
        'NOT_TESTED_DATA_MISSING' in regulatory_check_by_portfolio.to_string()
        or regulatory_constraints_config['testable'].all()
    )
) else 'FAILED'
HIGH_SHARPE_FLAGS_DONE = 'PASSED' if {'high_sharpe_flag','interpretation'}.issubset(portfolio_plausibility_checks.columns) else 'FAILED'
COVARIANCE_SOURCE_DOCUMENTED = 'PASSED' if COVARIANCE_SOURCE in {'APT','SHRUNK','EMPIRICAL'} and not covariance_source_summary.empty else 'FAILED'
REGULATORY_CONFIG_COMPLETE = 'PASSED' if set(['constraint_id','constraint_name','origin','scope','constraint_type','asset_class','sub_class','issuer','threshold_pct','denominator','hard_constraint','testable','data_required','missing_data','implementation_status','comment']).issubset(regulatory_constraints_config.columns) else 'FAILED'
TOTAL_PORTFOLIO_CONSTRAINTS_CHECKED = 'PASSED' if set(['OK','NOT_TESTED_DATA_MISSING']).issubset(set(regulatory_check_by_portfolio['status'])) else 'FAILED'

display(Markdown("Aucune violation n’a été détectée sur les contraintes testables. Certaines contraintes réglementaires restent non testées faute de données détaillées ; la conclusion ne constitue donc pas une certification réglementaire exhaustive."))
display(regulatory_scope_summary)
display(regulatory_constraints_config)
display(regulatory_check_by_portfolio.head(20))
display(covariance_source_summary)
display(portfolio_plausibility_checks.sort_values('sharpe_ratio', ascending=False).head(10))

Aucune violation n’a été détectée sur les contraintes testables. Certaines contraintes réglementaires restent non testées faute de données détaillées ; la conclusion ne constitue donc pas une certification réglementaire exhaustive.

constraint_id constraint_name origin scope constraint_type asset_class sub_class issuer threshold_pct denominator hard_constraint testable data_required missing_data implementation_status comment
0 COVERAGE_GLOBAL Couverture globale des provisions techniques LEGAL_REGULATORY portefeuille_total min all_assets 1.0 technical_provisions True True CHECKED_POST_OPTIMIZATION
1 STATE_MIN_20_PT Titres émis ou garantis par l'État >= 20% PT LEGAL_REGULATORY portefeuille_total min government_bond 0.2 technical_provisions True True CHECKED_POST_OPTIMIZATION
2 LISTED_EQUITY_PER_COMPANY_MAX_10_PT Action cotée BVMT par société <= 10% PT LEGAL_REGULATORY portefeuille_total max listed_equity_per_company 0.1 technical_provisions True True CHECKED_POST_OPTIMIZATION
3 REAL_ESTATE_TOTAL_MAX_20_PT Immobilier total <= 20% PT LEGAL_REGULATORY portefeuille_total max real_estate 0.2 technical_provisions True True CHECKED_POST_OPTIMIZATION
4 SICAR_TOTAL_MAX_10_PT SICAR/SICAF total <= 10% PT LEGAL_REGULATORY portefeuille_total max sicar_total 0.1 technical_provisions True True CHECKED_POST_OPTIMIZATION
5 CAPITAL_SOCIAL_LIMITS Limites en pourcentage du capital social UNTESTED_MISSING_DATA portefeuille_total max issuer NaN capital_social True False data_missing CHECK_NOT_ENFORCED_MISSING_DATA

8. Stress tests complémentaires¶

Le stress test obligataire repose sur une approximation de premier ordre par duration modifiée. Il ne remplace pas une revalorisation complète des cashflows, mais fournit une mesure synthétique de sensibilité aux taux et aux spreads. Si la duration modifiée n'est pas disponible, la maturité résiduelle est utilisée comme proxy prudent plafonné à 7 ans et explicitement flaggée.

In [12]:
Stress_Test_Summary = stress_tests_by_portfolio(portfolios, universe, context)
stress_flags = set(Stress_Test_Summary['data_quality_flag'].dropna()) if 'data_quality_flag' in Stress_Test_Summary.columns else set()
if 'DURATION_MISSING_FOR_STRESS_TEST' in stress_flags:
    FIXED_INCOME_STRESS_TEST_DONE = 'FAILED'
elif 'DURATION_PROXY_USED' in stress_flags:
    FIXED_INCOME_STRESS_TEST_DONE = 'WARNING_IF_PROXY'
else:
    FIXED_INCOME_STRESS_TEST_DONE = 'PASSED'

display(Stress_Test_Summary.head(12))
print('Contrôle stress obligataire:', FIXED_INCOME_STRESS_TEST_DONE)
portfolio_name scenario_name affected_asset_class shock_bps_or_pct exposure_weight exposure_value estimated_portfolio_impact estimated_impact_pct estimated_impact_value duration_source data_quality_flag quality_flag

11 Minimum_Variance Choc spread corporate +200 bps corporate_bond 0.02 0.563933 1.865856e+08 -0.019110 -0.019110 -6.322764e+06 PROXY_MIN_residual_maturity_7Y DURATION_PROXY_USED DURATION_PROXY_USED 
Contrôle stress obligataire: WARNING_IF_PROXY

Contrôle de plausibilité économique des rendements attendus et des Sharpe ratios¶

Les Sharpe ratios élevés proviennent de la combinaison entre rendements attendus APT et covariance APT. Ils ne doivent pas être interprétés comme une performance garantie. Les portefeuilles avec Sharpe supérieur à 3 nécessitent une revue économique complémentaire.

In [13]:
asset_vol_apt = pd.Series(np.sqrt(np.diag(Sigma_APT.to_numpy(float))), index=Sigma_APT.index, name='volatility_APT_asset')
APT_Plausibility_Check = universe[['asset_id','asset_name','asset_type','asset_class','expected_return_annualized']].copy()
APT_Plausibility_Check = APT_Plausibility_Check.merge(asset_vol_apt.rename_axis('asset_id').reset_index(), on='asset_id', how='left')
if 'historical_return_annualized' in universe.columns:
    APT_Plausibility_Check['historical_return_annualized'] = pd.to_numeric(universe['historical_return_annualized'], errors='coerce')
else:
    APT_Plausibility_Check['historical_return_annualized'] = np.nan
APT_Plausibility_Check['apt_minus_historical_return'] = APT_Plausibility_Check['expected_return_annualized'] - APT_Plausibility_Check['historical_return_annualized']
APT_Plausibility_Check['abs_gap_apt_vs_historical'] = APT_Plausibility_Check['apt_minus_historical_return'].abs()
APT_Plausibility_Check['rf_annual'] = rf_annual

APT_Plausibility_Summary = pd.DataFrame([
    {'metric': 'rf_annual', 'min': rf_annual, 'max': rf_annual, 'mean': rf_annual, 'median': rf_annual},
    {'metric': 'mu_APT', 'min': mu_APT.min(), 'max': mu_APT.max(), 'mean': mu_APT.mean(), 'median': mu_APT.median()},
    {'metric': 'volatility_APT_asset', 'min': asset_vol_apt.min(), 'max': asset_vol_apt.max(), 'mean': asset_vol_apt.mean(), 'median': asset_vol_apt.median()},
])
Top10_APT_Returns = APT_Plausibility_Check.nlargest(10, 'expected_return_annualized')
Top10_APT_vs_Historical_Gap = APT_Plausibility_Check.nlargest(10, 'abs_gap_apt_vs_historical')
HIGH_SHARPE_REQUIRES_ECONOMIC_REVIEW = bool((Optimization_Comparison['sharpe_ratio'] > 3.0).any())
Optimization_Comparison['economic_review_flag'] = np.where(
    Optimization_Comparison['sharpe_ratio'] > 3.0,
    'HIGH_SHARPE_REQUIRES_ECONOMIC_REVIEW',
    'OK'
)
APT_PLAUSIBILITY_CHECK_DONE = 'PASSED' if not APT_Plausibility_Check.empty and np.isfinite(APT_Plausibility_Check['expected_return_annualized']).all() else 'FAILED'

display(APT_Plausibility_Summary)
display(Top10_APT_Returns[['asset_name','asset_type','expected_return_annualized','volatility_APT_asset']])
display(Top10_APT_vs_Historical_Gap[['asset_name','expected_return_annualized','historical_return_annualized','apt_minus_historical_return']])
print('Portefeuilles avec Sharpe > 3:', int((Optimization_Comparison['sharpe_ratio'] > 3.0).sum()))

11 EO AB SUB 2023-2 0.110430 0.131725 -0.021295
0 BTA 7,4% 02/2030 0.100974 0.117582 -0.016608 
Portefeuilles avec Sharpe > 3: 2

Analyse de sensibilité à la contrainte de turnover¶

La contrainte de turnover est active lorsque le turnover réalisé atteint exactement la limite autorisée. Une forte variation des portefeuilles lorsque la limite passe de 20 % à 50 % indique une sensibilité élevée à la contrainte de réallocation.

In [14]:
def top_weights_label(weights, n=5):
    tmp = universe[['asset_name']].copy()
    tmp['weight'] = np.asarray(weights, dtype=float)
    return '; '.join(f"{r.asset_name}: {r.weight:.1%}" for r in tmp.nlargest(n, 'weight').itertuples())

turnover_limits_to_test = [0.20, 0.30, 0.40, 0.50]
models_for_sensitivity = ['Minimum_Variance', 'Max_Sharpe', 'Mean_CVaR_95', 'Risk_Parity']
turnover_rows = []
for limit in turnover_limits_to_test:
    sens_config = replace(CONFIG, turnover_thresholds=(limit,))
    sens_portfolios, sens_diag = solve_all_models(mu_APT, Sigma_APT, Returns_Historical, universe, context, sens_config)
    sens_summary_rows = []
    for model_name in models_for_sensitivity:
        weights = sens_portfolios.get(model_name)
        diag = sens_diag.set_index('portfolio_name').to_dict('index').get(model_name, {})
        if weights is None:
            turnover_rows.append({
                'turnover_limit': limit, 'model_name': model_name, 'feasibility_status': 'MISSING_MODEL',
                'top_5_assets_by_weight': '',
            })
            continue
        row, _ = portfolio_metrics(model_name, weights, mu_APT, Sigma_APT, Returns_Historical, rf_annual, current_weights, universe, context, Regulatory_Constraints_Map, str(diag.get('solver_status', 'SOLVED')))
        var_loss, cvar_loss = weekly_loss_metrics(weights)
        out = {
            'turnover_limit': limit,
            'model_name': model_name,
            'expected_return_APT': row['expected_return_APT'],
            'volatility_APT': row['volatility_APT'],
            'sharpe_APT': row['sharpe_ratio'],
            'VaR_95_weekly_loss': var_loss,
            'CVaR_95_weekly_loss': cvar_loss,
            'turnover_realized': row['turnover'],
            'feasibility_status': 'FEASIBLE' if bool(diag.get('success', False)) and row['turnover'] <= limit + 1e-8 else 'INFEASIBLE_OR_LIMIT_BREACH',
            'top_5_assets_by_weight': top_weights_label(weights),
            'regulatory_status': row['regulatory_status'],
            'herfindahl_index': row['herfindahl_index'],
            'cvar_95_historical': row['cvar_95_historical'],
            'turnover': row['turnover'],
        }
        turnover_rows.append(out)
        sens_summary_rows.append(row)
    sens_scores = build_multiobjective_scores(pd.DataFrame(sens_summary_rows))
    if not sens_scores.empty:
        selected = sens_scores.iloc[0]
        turnover_rows.append({
            'turnover_limit': limit,
            'model_name': 'Recommended_Scoring',
            'expected_return_APT': selected['expected_return_APT'],
            'volatility_APT': selected['volatility_APT'],
            'sharpe_APT': selected['sharpe_ratio'],
            'VaR_95_weekly_loss': selected.get('VaR_95_weekly_loss', selected.get('var_95_historical', np.nan)),
            'CVaR_95_weekly_loss': selected.get('CVaR_95_weekly_loss', selected.get('cvar_95_historical', np.nan)),
            'turnover_realized': selected['turnover'],
            'feasibility_status': 'FEASIBLE_RECOMMENDED_BY_SCORING',
            'top_5_assets_by_weight': 'Voir modèle source: ' + str(selected['portfolio_name']),
        })

Turnover_Sensitivity = pd.DataFrame(turnover_rows)

turnover_sensitivity = Turnover_Sensitivity.rename(columns={
    'expected_return_APT': 'expected_return_annualized',
    'volatility_APT': 'volatility_annualized',
    'sharpe_APT': 'sharpe_ratio',
    'VaR_95_weekly_loss': 'var_loss_95',
    'CVaR_95_weekly_loss': 'cvar_loss_95',
    'top_5_assets_by_weight': 'top_5_assets',
}).copy()
for col in ['regulatory_status','top_5_assets']:
    if col not in turnover_sensitivity.columns:
        turnover_sensitivity[col] = ''

TURNOVER_SENSITIVITY_DONE = 'PASSED' if not Turnover_Sensitivity.empty and set(turnover_limits_to_test).issubset(set(Turnover_Sensitivity['turnover_limit'].dropna())) else 'FAILED'
display(Turnover_Sensitivity[['turnover_limit','model_name','expected_return_APT','volatility_APT','sharpe_APT','VaR_95_weekly_loss','CVaR_95_weekly_loss','turnover_realized','feasibility_status','top_5_assets_by_weight']])
print('Contrôle sensibilité turnover:', TURNOVER_SENSITIVITY_DONE)
turnover_limit model_name expected_return_APT volatility_APT sharpe_APT VaR_95_weekly_loss CVaR_95_weekly_loss turnover_realized feasibility_status top_5_assets_by_weight

Contrôle sensibilité turnover: PASSED

Interprétation de la sensibilité à la contrainte de turnover¶

La contrainte de turnover est active lorsque le turnover réalisé atteint exactement la limite autorisée. Une forte variation des portefeuilles lorsque la limite passe de 20 % à 50 % indique une sensibilité élevée à la contrainte de réallocation.

In [15]:
turnover_interpretation_rows = []
for limit, grp in Turnover_Sensitivity.groupby('turnover_limit'):
    feasible = grp.loc[grp['feasibility_status'].eq('FEASIBLE')].copy()
    infeasible_count = int((~grp['feasibility_status'].eq('FEASIBLE')).sum())
    if feasible.empty:
        best_model = None
        best_sharpe = np.nan
        best_cvar = np.nan
    else:
        best = feasible.sort_values('sharpe_APT', ascending=False).iloc[0]
        best_model = best['model_name']
        best_sharpe = best['sharpe_APT']
        best_cvar = feasible['CVaR_95_weekly_loss'].min()
    if limit <= 0.20 and (feasible.empty or feasible['turnover_realized'].fillna(0).max() < 0.05):
        interpretation = "Le seuil de 20 % semble trop restrictif pour générer une réallocation significative."
    elif limit >= 0.40 and pd.notna(best_sharpe) and best_sharpe > 3:
        interpretation = "L’assouplissement du turnover améliore mécaniquement le score, mais peut produire des allocations plus sensibles aux hypothèses APT."
    else:
        interpretation = "La limite testée fournit des solutions comparables et doit être arbitrée selon la gouvernance de réallocation."
    turnover_interpretation_rows.append({
        'turnover_limit': limit,
        'nb_feasible_models': int(len(feasible)),
        'nb_infeasible_models': infeasible_count,
        'best_model': best_model,
        'best_sharpe': best_sharpe,
        'best_cvar': best_cvar,
        'interpretation': interpretation,
    })

turnover_sensitivity_interpretation = pd.DataFrame(turnover_interpretation_rows)
TURNOVER_SENSITIVITY_INTERPRETED = 'PASSED' if not turnover_sensitivity_interpretation.empty else 'FAILED'
display(turnover_sensitivity_interpretation)
turnover_limit nb_feasible_models nb_infeasible_models best_model best_sharpe best_cvar interpretation
0 0.2 0 5 None NaN NaN Le seuil de 20 % semble trop restrictif pour g...
1 0.3 4 1 Max_Sharpe 3.485108 0.000503 La limite testée fournit des solutions compara...
2 0.4 4 1 Max_Sharpe 7.701384 0.000130 L’assouplissement du turnover améliore mécaniq...
3 0.5 4 1 Max_Sharpe 10.957803 0.000000 L’assouplissement du turnover améliore mécaniq...

Validation ex post : backtests historiques des allocations¶

Le backtest est indicatif et repose sur l’historique disponible. Il compare le comportement historique des allocations, mais ne constitue pas une garantie de performance future.

Les portefeuilles sont testés statiquement sur les mêmes rendements hebdomadaires historiques, sans reconstitution artificielle des rendements manquants et sans coûts de transaction.

In [16]:
def _selected_portfolio_weights():
    selected = {
        'Current_Portfolio': portfolios.get('Current_Portfolio'),
        'Minimum_Variance': portfolios.get('Minimum_Variance'),
        'Max_Sharpe': portfolios.get('Max_Sharpe'),
        'Max_Return': portfolios.get('Max_Return'),
        'Mean_CVaR_95': portfolios.get('Mean_CVaR_95'),
        'Risk_Parity': portfolios.get('Risk_Parity'),
        'MultiCriteria_Recommended_Portfolio': portfolios.get('MultiCriteria_Recommended_Portfolio'),
    }
    if not Monte_Carlo_Feasible_Portfolios.empty:
        max_sharpe_row = Monte_Carlo_Feasible_Portfolios.sort_values('sharpe', ascending=False).iloc[0]
        min_vol_row = Monte_Carlo_Feasible_Portfolios.sort_values('volatility', ascending=True).iloc[0]
        selected['Monte_Carlo_Best_Sharpe'] = np.array(list(json.loads(max_sharpe_row['weights_json']).values()), dtype=float)
        selected['Monte_Carlo_Min_Variance'] = np.array(list(json.loads(min_vol_row['weights_json']).values()), dtype=float)
    return {k: np.asarray(v, dtype=float) for k, v in selected.items() if v is not None}


def infer_periods_per_year(date_index):
    dates = pd.to_datetime(date_index).sort_values()
    median_gap = dates.to_series().diff().dt.days.median()
    if pd.isna(median_gap):
        return 52, "unknown_default_weekly"
    if median_gap <= 2:
        return 252, "daily"
    if median_gap <= 8:
        return 52, "weekly"
    if median_gap <= 35:
        return 12, "monthly"
    return 52, "unknown_default_weekly"


BACKTEST_PERIODS_PER_YEAR, BACKTEST_DATA_FREQUENCY = infer_periods_per_year(Returns_Historical.index)
frequency_flag_suffix = BACKTEST_DATA_FREQUENCY.upper() if BACKTEST_DATA_FREQUENCY in {'daily', 'weekly', 'monthly'} else 'UNKNOWN_DEFAULT_WEEKLY'
BACKTEST_FREQUENCY_FLAG = f'FREQUENCY_INFERRED_{frequency_flag_suffix}'
Backtest_Frequency_Control = pd.DataFrame([{
    'control_name': 'BACKTEST_FREQUENCY_INFERENCE',
    'BACKTEST_DATA_FREQUENCY': BACKTEST_DATA_FREQUENCY,
    'BACKTEST_PERIODS_PER_YEAR': BACKTEST_PERIODS_PER_YEAR,
    'frequency_flag': BACKTEST_FREQUENCY_FLAG,
    'status': 'PASSED',
    'comment': 'Frequence inferee depuis les dates de la matrice de rendements utilisee pour le backtest.'
}])


def run_static_portfolio_backtest(weights_dict, returns_matrix, rf_weekly_series=None):
    """Backtest statique sans remplissage artificiel des rendements manquants."""
    global BACKTEST_PERIODS_PER_YEAR, BACKTEST_DATA_FREQUENCY, BACKTEST_FREQUENCY_FLAG, Backtest_Frequency_Control
    BACKTEST_PERIODS_PER_YEAR, BACKTEST_DATA_FREQUENCY = infer_periods_per_year(returns_matrix.index)
    frequency_flag_suffix = BACKTEST_DATA_FREQUENCY.upper() if BACKTEST_DATA_FREQUENCY in {'daily', 'weekly', 'monthly'} else 'UNKNOWN_DEFAULT_WEEKLY'
    BACKTEST_FREQUENCY_FLAG = f'FREQUENCY_INFERRED_{frequency_flag_suffix}'
    periods_per_year = BACKTEST_PERIODS_PER_YEAR
    Backtest_Frequency_Control = pd.DataFrame([{
        'control_name': 'BACKTEST_FREQUENCY_INFERENCE',
        'BACKTEST_DATA_FREQUENCY': BACKTEST_DATA_FREQUENCY,
        'BACKTEST_PERIODS_PER_YEAR': BACKTEST_PERIODS_PER_YEAR,
        'frequency_flag': BACKTEST_FREQUENCY_FLAG,
        'status': 'PASSED',
        'comment': 'Frequence inferee depuis les dates de la matrice de rendements utilisee pour le backtest.'
    }])

    returns = returns_matrix.copy()
    missing_assets = [asset for asset in mu_APT.index if asset not in returns.columns]
    if missing_assets:
        raise ValueError(f"Actifs absents des rendements historiques pour le backtest: {missing_assets}")

    aligned_returns = returns.loc[:, list(mu_APT.index)].copy()
    original_rows = len(aligned_returns)
    aligned_returns = aligned_returns.dropna(how='any')
    flags = ['SAME_SAMPLE_BACKTEST', 'NO_TRANSACTION_COSTS_INCLUDED', 'INDICATIVE_BACKTEST_ONLY', BACKTEST_FREQUENCY_FLAG]
    if len(aligned_returns) < original_rows:
        flags.append('MISSING_RETURNS_EXCLUDED')
    if len(aligned_returns) < periods_per_year:
        flags.append('SHORT_HISTORY_WARNING')

    if rf_weekly_series is None:
        rf_period = pd.Series((1 + rf_annual) ** (1 / periods_per_year) - 1, index=aligned_returns.index)
    else:
        rf_period = pd.Series(rf_weekly_series).reindex(aligned_returns.index).dropna()
        aligned_returns = aligned_returns.loc[rf_period.index]

    returns_rows = []
    metrics_rows = []
    drawdown_rows = []
    current_series = None
    portfolio_series_map = {}
    for name, weights in weights_dict.items():
        portfolio_return = pd.Series(aligned_returns.to_numpy(float) @ weights, index=aligned_returns.index, name=name)
        portfolio_series_map[name] = portfolio_return
        if name == 'Current_Portfolio':
            current_series = portfolio_return.copy()
        wealth = (1.0 + portfolio_return).cumprod()
        drawdown = wealth / wealth.cummax() - 1.0
        q05 = portfolio_return.quantile(0.05)
        var_loss = max(0.0, -float(q05))
        tail = portfolio_return.loc[portfolio_return <= q05]
        cvar_loss = max(0.0, -float(tail.mean())) if len(tail) else var_loss
        downside = portfolio_return.loc[portfolio_return < 0].std(ddof=1) * np.sqrt(periods_per_year) if (portfolio_return < 0).any() else 0.0
        excess = portfolio_return - rf_period.loc[portfolio_return.index]
        realized_vol = portfolio_return.std(ddof=1) * np.sqrt(periods_per_year)
        realized_sharpe = float(excess.mean() * periods_per_year / realized_vol) if realized_vol > 1e-12 else np.nan
        metrics_rows.append({
            'portfolio_name': name,
            'cumulative_return': float(wealth.iloc[-1] - 1.0),
            'annualized_return_realized': float(wealth.iloc[-1] ** (periods_per_year / max(len(portfolio_return), 1)) - 1.0),
            'annualized_volatility_realized': float(realized_vol),
            'realized_sharpe': realized_sharpe,
            'downside_deviation_realized': float(downside),
            'var_loss_95_realized': var_loss,
            'cvar_loss_95_realized': cvar_loss,
            'max_drawdown_realized': float(drawdown.min()),
            'best_period': float(portfolio_return.max()),
            'worst_period': float(portfolio_return.min()),
            'positive_periods_ratio': float((portfolio_return > 0).mean()),
            'hit_ratio_vs_current': np.nan,
            'tracking_error_vs_current': np.nan,
            'information_ratio_vs_current': np.nan,
            'BACKTEST_DATA_FREQUENCY': BACKTEST_DATA_FREQUENCY,
            'BACKTEST_PERIODS_PER_YEAR': BACKTEST_PERIODS_PER_YEAR,
            'observations_used': int(len(portfolio_return)),
            'nb_observations': int(len(portfolio_return)),
            'final_quality_flag': '|'.join(flags),
        })
        returns_rows.extend([
            {'observation_date': idx, 'portfolio_name': name, 'period_return': val, 'cumulative_wealth': wealth.loc[idx]}
            for idx, val in portfolio_return.items()
        ])
        drawdown_rows.extend([
            {'observation_date': idx, 'portfolio_name': name, 'drawdown': val}
            for idx, val in drawdown.items()
        ])

    metrics = pd.DataFrame(metrics_rows)
    if current_series is not None:
        for idx, row in metrics.iterrows():
            name = row['portfolio_name']
            series = portfolio_series_map[name]
            common = series.index.intersection(current_series.index)
            if name == 'Current_Portfolio' or len(common) < 2:
                continue
            diff = series.loc[common] - current_series.loc[common]
            te = diff.std(ddof=1) * np.sqrt(periods_per_year)
            active_return = diff.mean() * periods_per_year
            metrics.loc[idx, 'hit_ratio_vs_current'] = float((series.loc[common] > current_series.loc[common]).mean())
            metrics.loc[idx, 'tracking_error_vs_current'] = float(te)
            metrics.loc[idx, 'information_ratio_vs_current'] = float(active_return / te) if te > 1e-12 else np.nan

    quality_flags = pd.DataFrame([
        {'quality_flag': flag, 'status': 'WARNING' if 'WARNING' in flag or 'EXCLUDED' in flag else 'INFO', 'comment': 'Flag methodologique du backtest indicatif.'}
        for flag in flags
    ])
    return pd.DataFrame(returns_rows), metrics, pd.DataFrame(drawdown_rows), quality_flags


backtest_weights_dict = _selected_portfolio_weights()
backtest_returns, backtest_metrics, backtest_drawdowns, backtest_quality_flags = run_static_portfolio_backtest(
    backtest_weights_dict,
    Returns_Historical,
)


def run_walk_forward_validation():
    """Validation walk-forward limitee : reoptimisation train, test statique hors echantillon."""
    periods_per_year = BACKTEST_PERIODS_PER_YEAR
    returns = Returns_Historical.loc[:, list(mu_APT.index)].dropna(how='any')
    n_obs = len(returns)
    split = int(n_obs * 0.60)
    train = returns.iloc[:split]
    test = returns.iloc[split:]
    if len(train) < 25 or len(test) < 15:
        return pd.DataFrame([{
            'model_name': 'LIMITED_WALK_FORWARD',
            'train_start': train.index.min() if len(train) else pd.NaT,
            'train_end': train.index.max() if len(train) else pd.NaT,
            'test_start': test.index.min() if len(test) else pd.NaT,
            'test_end': test.index.max() if len(test) else pd.NaT,
            'train_observations': len(train),
            'test_observations': len(test),
            'BACKTEST_DATA_FREQUENCY': BACKTEST_DATA_FREQUENCY,
            'BACKTEST_PERIODS_PER_YEAR': BACKTEST_PERIODS_PER_YEAR,
            'test_return': np.nan,
            'test_volatility': np.nan,
            'test_sharpe': np.nan,
            'test_cvar_loss_95': np.nan,
            'test_max_drawdown': np.nan,
            'status': 'NOT_RUN_INSUFFICIENT_HISTORY',
            'comment': 'Historique insuffisant pour une validation walk-forward robuste.',
        }])
    try:
        mu_train = train.mean() * periods_per_year
        sigma_train = train.cov() * periods_per_year
        sigma_train = (sigma_train + sigma_train.T) / 2
        vals, vecs = np.linalg.eigh(sigma_train.to_numpy(float))
        vals = np.maximum(vals, 1e-8)
        sigma_train = pd.DataFrame((vecs @ np.diag(vals) @ vecs.T), index=sigma_train.index, columns=sigma_train.columns)
        wf_config = replace(CONFIG, turnover_thresholds=(CONFIG.primary_turnover_limit,))
        wf_portfolios, wf_diag = solve_all_models(mu_train, sigma_train, train, universe, context, wf_config)
        model_names = ['Minimum_Variance', 'Max_Sharpe', 'Mean_CVaR_95']
    except Exception as exc:
        return pd.DataFrame([{
            'model_name': 'LIMITED_WALK_FORWARD',
            'train_start': train.index.min(),
            'train_end': train.index.max(),
            'test_start': test.index.min(),
            'test_end': test.index.max(),
            'train_observations': len(train),
            'test_observations': len(test),
            'BACKTEST_DATA_FREQUENCY': BACKTEST_DATA_FREQUENCY,
            'BACKTEST_PERIODS_PER_YEAR': BACKTEST_PERIODS_PER_YEAR,
            'test_return': np.nan,
            'test_volatility': np.nan,
            'test_sharpe': np.nan,
            'test_cvar_loss_95': np.nan,
            'test_max_drawdown': np.nan,
            'status': 'NOT_RUN_OPTIMIZATION_UNSTABLE',
            'comment': f'Walk-forward non force car optimisation instable: {exc}',
        }])
    rows = []
    diag_map = wf_diag.set_index('portfolio_name').to_dict('index') if not wf_diag.empty else {}
    for name in model_names:
        weights = wf_portfolios.get(name)
        if weights is None or not bool(diag_map.get(name, {}).get('success', False)):
            rows.append({
                'model_name': name,
                'train_start': train.index.min(),
                'train_end': train.index.max(),
                'test_start': test.index.min(),
                'test_end': test.index.max(),
                'train_observations': len(train),
                'test_observations': len(test),
                'BACKTEST_DATA_FREQUENCY': BACKTEST_DATA_FREQUENCY,
                'BACKTEST_PERIODS_PER_YEAR': BACKTEST_PERIODS_PER_YEAR,
                'test_return': np.nan,
                'test_volatility': np.nan,
                'test_sharpe': np.nan,
                'test_cvar_loss_95': np.nan,
                'test_max_drawdown': np.nan,
                'status': 'NOT_RUN_OPTIMIZATION_UNSTABLE',
                'comment': 'Modele non resolu de facon stable sur la periode train.',
            })
            continue
        ret = pd.Series(test.to_numpy(float) @ weights, index=test.index)
        wealth = (1.0 + ret).cumprod()
        dd = wealth / wealth.cummax() - 1.0
        q05 = ret.quantile(0.05)
        tail = ret.loc[ret <= q05]
        vol = ret.std(ddof=1) * np.sqrt(periods_per_year)
        rows.append({
            'model_name': name,
            'train_start': train.index.min(),
            'train_end': train.index.max(),
            'test_start': test.index.min(),
            'test_end': test.index.max(),
            'train_observations': len(train),
            'test_observations': len(test),
            'BACKTEST_DATA_FREQUENCY': BACKTEST_DATA_FREQUENCY,
            'BACKTEST_PERIODS_PER_YEAR': BACKTEST_PERIODS_PER_YEAR,
            'test_return': float(wealth.iloc[-1] - 1.0),
            'test_volatility': float(vol),
            'test_sharpe': float(ret.mean() * periods_per_year / vol) if vol > 1e-12 else np.nan,
            'test_cvar_loss_95': max(0.0, -float(tail.mean())) if len(tail) else max(0.0, -float(q05)),
            'test_max_drawdown': float(dd.min()),
            'status': 'RUN_TRAIN_REOPTIMIZED_TESTED_OUT_OF_SAMPLE',
            'comment': 'Reoptimisation limitee sur train puis test statique hors echantillon ; historique court.',
        })
    return pd.DataFrame(rows)

walk_forward_summary = run_walk_forward_validation()
STATIC_BACKTEST_DONE = 'PASSED' if not backtest_metrics.empty else 'FAILED'
WALK_FORWARD_VALIDATION_DONE_OR_SKIPPED_WITH_REASON = 'PASSED' if not walk_forward_summary.empty else 'FAILED'

print('Frequence backtest detectee:', BACKTEST_DATA_FREQUENCY, '| periodes par an:', BACKTEST_PERIODS_PER_YEAR)
display(Backtest_Frequency_Control)
display(backtest_quality_flags)
display(backtest_metrics.sort_values('realized_sharpe', ascending=False))
display(walk_forward_summary)

5 Risk_Parity 0.153456 0.157479 0.011120 6.538472 0.007392 0.000403 0.000878 -0.001938 0.003430 -0.001938 0.849593 0.495935 0.006947 -2.029969 daily 252 246 246 SAME_SAMPLE_BACKTEST|NO_TRANSACTION_COSTS_INCL...
2 Max_Sharpe 0.143786 0.147540 0.010111 6.336437 0.007063 0.000335 0.000815 -0.001960 0.002891 -0.001960 0.865854 0.520325 0.006256 -3.635504 daily 252 246 246 SAME_SAMPLE_BACKTEST|NO_TRANSACTION_COSTS_INCL...
